nodes.label: 7-Layer Infrastructure Model (L1-L7)
nodes.rationale: Maps cryptographic findings to infrastructure layers: L1 Network, L2 PKI, L3 HSM/KMS, L4 Application, L5 Data, L6 Infrastructure, L7 Endpoint. Enables prioritized remediation by layer.

nodes.label: 5-Dimension Weighted Risk Score Model
nodes.rationale: Weights: HNDL exposure 30%, Network exposure 20%, Algorithm score 20%, Replaceability 15%, Regulatory 15%. Business Criticality was dropped from original 6-dim model.

nodes.label: Mosca HNDL Risk Model
nodes.rationale: DEFAULT_QUANTUM_HORIZON_YEAR=2034 (was 2035). Used to compute HNDL exposure dimension of risk score. Env override via MOSCA_HORIZON_YEAR.

nodes.label: CycloneDX CBOM v1.7 (ECMA-424)
nodes.rationale: Uses cyclonedx-python-lib 11.x. Includes cryptoProperties with algorithmProperties, nistQuantumSecurityLevel, classicalSecurityLevel, certificationLevel, pqcSafe. Fields: OID, curve, variant per-spec.

nodes.label: SAST Static Analysis Connector
nodes.rationale: Regex-based only despite docstring claiming AST parsing. 200-file cap per language. Does not consult pqc_algorithm_registry.json for pqc_status classification.

nodes.label: SAST Finding Categories (rsa_keygen, weak_hash, pqc_algorithms, etc.)
AWS PQC Scanner (KMS, ACM, ELBv2, CloudFront, S3, IAM)
Kubernetes Connector (TLS secrets, etcd, API cert, CSRs)
Oracle TDE Connector (cx_Oracle, L5 Data Layer)
Windows Cert Store Connector (L7 Passive Inventory)
Findings Creation Workflow (Asset Upsert → Algorithm Classification → Finding Generation)
P7-01 Scan-over-Scan Diff Engine (Missing)
nodes.rationale: Critical path gap. Requires backend/app/analysis/diff_engine.py to compare consecutive scan results and flag PQC regressions (e.g. assets reverting from ML-KEM to classical RSA).

nodes.label: P7-03 Drift Alert Dispatcher (Missing)
nodes.rationale: Periodic Celery beat task (every 24h) to run drift assessment on latest scans and publish alerts to Slack hooks or SMTP relays.

nodes.label: PQC Hybrid Feature Detection (OIDs for Dilithium, Falcon, SPHINCS+, Kyber)
Server Certificate Fetching (SSL socket + OpenSSL fallback)
Indian Banking Vertical Opportunity
nodes.rationale: Zero domestic Indian PQC scanner products. IT security budgets INR 500Cr+ at large banks. First-mover window 2025-2028. Requires RBI-aligned output, data residency, on-prem deployment, INR billing.

nodes.label: Global Mid-Market Gap ($15K-$75K/yr)
nodes.rationale: The $15K-$75K/yr price tier has zero competition globally. Open source requires too much engineering; commercial tools start at $50K+.

nodes.label: Vendor PQC Readiness Database (Defensible IP Moat)
Palo Alto Networks / CyberArk / Venafi (Combined Entity)
Harvest Now Decrypt Later (HNDL) Threat Model
nodes.rationale: Attackers are stealing encrypted data today and storing it until quantum computers can decrypt. Long-lived data (financial records, IP, health data) is already vulnerable. This is why PQC migration is urgent today.

nodes.label: Agentless-First Architecture
nodes.rationale: 80% coverage via remote APIs and protocol handshakes. Agents only for host-local endpoints, legacy servers, or air-gapped systems. Balances visibility and setup friction.

nodes.label: Market Entry Window (2025-2027)
nodes.rationale: First-mover advantage in underserved segments. Window closes 2028-2030 as large platforms add mid-market modules. 2031-2035 market consolidates via M&A.

nodes.label: PQC Scanner Business Strategy Fact-Check Report
Risk Service (5-dim scoring + NIST IR 8547 deprecation)
Gap: Indian Banking Infrastructure Uncovered
nodes.rationale: No existing product covers Payment HSM 3DES/PIN block checks, core banking system crypto scanning (Finacle, Temenos), ATM/POS assessment, RBI/NPCI/SWIFT interface compliance.

nodes.label: Gap: Runtime Reachability Verification
nodes.rationale: Every SAST tool finds algorithms statically present in code. None verify which are actually executed at runtime in production. Creates massive false positives for unused legacy code paths.

nodes.label: Gap: Deployment Simplicity (No Single docker-compose Deploy)
Gap: HSM and Key-Management Deep Enumeration
Gap: Migration Progress Tracking Over Time
nodes.rationale: No tool tracks migration progress over time with a % complete metric toward 2030/2035. Banks and auditors need evidence of progress, not just point-in-time snapshots.
